subcodes.first_line: Glory be to God! From one perspective all things are seen to be in motion, assisting and guiding, while from another view [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله از یکنظر مشاهده میشود جمیع اشیا متحرک و ناصر و هادی و از نظر دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @personal instructions, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
